title: arabis ciliata subsp. serpyllifolia
intro: Arabis ciliata subsp. serpyllifolia, also known as rock cress, is a flowering plant species in the family Brassicaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic agent. The health benefits of Arabis ciliata subsp. serpyllifolia include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate skin conditions. In herbal preparations, rock cress is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although its use should be guided by a qualified healthcare professional due to potential interactions and side effects.
